name: event-driven-architecture
description: Event-driven architecture toolkit for CQRS, event sourcing, event stores, projections, and sagas.

interface.shortDescription: CQRS, event sourcing, projections, event stores, and saga workflows.
interface.longDescription: A toolkit for designing event-driven systems: deciding when CQRS or event sourcing is justified, designing event streams and stores, building projections and read models, and coordinating long-running workflows with sagas.
defaultPrompt: Use event-sourcing-architect to assess whether event sourcing fits this workflow
Use projection-patterns to design read models from event streams
Use saga-orchestration to design a compensating workflow
